mapper.select: SELECT id, order_header_id, order_no, line_seq, material_cd, material_nm, product_category, width, height, thickness, unit_type, quantity, area, unit, unit_price, amount, dong, ho, floor, window_type, location_detail, TO_CHAR(delivery_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS delivery_date, production_status, delivery_status, remarks FROM sales_order_detail WHERE order_header_id = #{headerId} ORDER BY line_seq ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sales_order_detail SET production_status = #{status}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sales_order_detail ( order_header_id, order_no, line_seq, material_cd, material_nm, product_category, width, height, thickness, unit_type, quantity, area, unit, unit_price, amount, dong, ho, floor, window_type, location_detail, delivery_date, remarks ) VALUES
(#{headerId}, #{orderNo}, ${idx} + 1, #{d.materialCd}, #{d.materialNm}, #{d.productCategory}, #{d.width}, #{d.height}, #{d.thickness}, #{d.unitType}, #{d.quantity}, #{d.area}, #{d.unit}, #{d.unitPrice}, #{d.amount}, #{d.dong}, #{d.ho}, #{d.floor}, #{d.windowType}, #{d.locationDetail},
CAST(#{d.deliveryDate} AS DATE)
NULL , #{d.remarks})
